recommendations.title: Would You Rather
recommendations.overview: Desperate to help her ailing brother, a young woman agrees to compete in a deadly game of "Would You Rather" hosted by a sadistic aristocrat.

recommendations.title: Baby Blues
recommendations.overview: On a secluded family farm, a mother suffers a psychotic break due to postpartum depression, forcing the eldest son to protect his sibling from the mother they have always known and loved.

recommendations.title: 30 Days of Night: Dark Days
recommendations.overview: After surviving the incidents in Barrow, Alaska, Stella Olemaun relocates to Los Angeles, where she intentionally attracts the attention of the local vampire population in order to avenge the death of her husband, Eben.

recommendations.title: Funny Games
recommendations.overview: Two psychotic young men take a mother, father, and son hostage in their vacation cabin and force them to play sadistic "games" with one another for their own amusement.

recommendations.title: Happy Hunting
recommendations.overview: An alcoholic drifter must battle withdrawal and psychotic rednecks after he becomes the target of a deranged sporting event.

recommendations.title: Most Beautiful Island
recommendations.overview: Chronicling one harrowing day in the life of Luciana, a young woman struggling to make ends meet while striving to escape her past. As Luciana’s day unfolds, she is whisked, physically and emotionally, through a series of troublesome, unforeseeable e

recommendations.title: Goodbye June
recommendations.overview: Four siblings' lives change drastically when their ailing mother takes a turn for the worse over the holiday season.

recommendations.title: The Wolf of Snow Hollow
recommendations.overview: Terror grips a small mountain town as bodies are discovered after each full moon. Losing sleep, raising a teenage daughter, and caring for his ailing father, officer Marshall struggles to remind himself there's no such thing as werewolves.

recommendations.title: Hush
recommendations.overview: A deaf woman is stalked by a psychotic killer in her secluded home.

recommendations.title: Victim
recommendations.overview: A web of blackmail and murder attracts the attention of a barrister with a seemingly idyllic life, threatening to derail his career on the path of success.
